examples: This and the Marauder are my new favorite Terran units.
The forecastle was like an angry hive of bees aroused by some marauder.
I can see the Marauder being powerful if micro'd effectively, but I do not have the skill to be able to do this.
History knows this town best for a raid by Mexican marauder Pancho Villa's forces on March 9, 1916.
Marauder systems are made with the same boutique level quality and care that every Digital Storm system is famous for.
